title: ACPX Windows wrapper shell fallback allowed cwd injection
description: The resolveSpawnCommand function in the ACPX runtime blindly delegates .cmd and .bat wrapper execution to the system shell (shell: true) on Windows without resolving the wrapper's actual entrypoint. When a model-controlled command resolves to a .cmd wrapper, arguments and cwd values are parsed by cmd.exe, allowing injection of shell metacharacters. The function also does not resolve bare command names via PATH/PATHEXT, so it cannot unwrap npm-style .cmd shims to their underlying Node.js scripts for safe shell-free execution.
